nasb.text: The governor said to them that they should not eat from the most holy things until a priest stood up with Urim and Thummim.

esv.text: The governor told them that they were not to partake of the most holy food, until there should be a priest to consult Urim and Thummim.

cnv.text: 省長告訴他們不可吃至聖之物，直等到有能用烏陵和土明來決疑的祭司興起來。

ccb.text: 省长吩咐他们，要等到用乌陵和土明求问上帝的祭司出现后，才可以吃至圣之物。
